name: trustflow
description: TrustFlow — deterministic AI governance gateway + generative policy boardroom

scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspace backend
scripts.smoke: npm run build:shared && npm run smoke --workspace backend
scripts.smoke:demo: npm run build:shared && QWEN_PROFILE=demo npm run smoke --workspace backend
scripts.negotiate: npm run build:shared && npm run negotiate --workspace backend --
scripts.negotiate:demo: npm run build:shared && QWEN_PROFILE=demo npm run negotiate --workspace backend --
scripts.capture:golden: npm run build:shared && npm run capture:golden --workspace backend --
scripts.capture:golden:demo: npm run build:shared && QWEN_PROFILE=demo npm run capture:golden --workspace backend --
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.dev:demo: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "QWEN_PROFILE=demo npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.dev:network: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "VITE_NETWORK=1 npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace web
